title: Thermostats, Not Engines: A New Picture of Halo Gas Regulation
comment: 7 pages, 3 figures, 1 table. Comments welcome. Companion paper Pontzen et al. in this arxiv listing
summary: We propose that black hole feedback regulates gas in massive halos by establishing an entropy ceiling; the resulting buoyant gas migrates to the virial radius with no additional energy input required. The FLAMINGO simulations support this picture: at the virial radius, outflow entropy is mass-independent for isotropic thermal feedback but depends on the solid angle of directly heated gas for jet feedback. Above a critical halo mass $M_\rm{crit} \approx 10^{13.5\text{--}14}\, M_\odot$, virial shocks overwhelm the ceiling, predicting rejuvenation of star formation in the most massive galaxies, supported by new low-redshift evidence from star formation rates and morphologies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出黑洞反馈通过建立熵天花板调控大质量暗晕气体，使浮力气体无需额外能量即可迁移至维里半径。FLAMINGO模拟支持该机制：各向同性热反馈时维里半径处外流熵与质量无关，而喷流反馈则取决于直接加热气体的立体角。临界暗晕质量约为10^13.5-14太阳质量，超过该质量时维里激波将压倒天花板，预测大质量星系恒星形成将重新活跃，并得到低红移观测证据支持。
AI.motivation: 现有黑洞反馈模型难以解释大质量暗晕中气体的行为，特别是为何某些星系在高质量阶段仍能维持恒星形成。作者试图提出一种统一的物理机制——熵天花板——来解释气体在暗晕中的输运和星系恒星形成的演化规律。
AI.method: 利用FLAMINGO流体模拟，对比各向同性热反馈与喷流反馈两种模式，研究维里半径处外流熵的分布特征，同时结合低红移观测数据验证模型预测。
AI.result: 各向同性热反馈下，维里半径外流熵与暗晕质量无关；喷流反馈下，熵取决于直接加热气体的立体角。存在临界质量（约10^13.5-14太阳质量），超过该值维里激波压倒熵天花板，大质量星系恒星形成将重新活跃。
AI.conclusion: 黑洞反馈建立的熵天花板机制可有效解释大质量暗晕中的气体输运行为，并能预测大质量星系恒星形成的再活跃现象，该预测已获得低红移观测数据的初步支持。

title: Circular polarization of the cosmic microwave background induced by the optical Magnus effect on gravitational lensing
summary: Polarization of the cosmic microwave background (CMB) brings out information not only on the early universe but also on the late-time large-scale structure via weak gravitational lensing. Here, we show that circular polarization is induced in principle from CMB temperature fluctuations when the optical Magnus effect is incorporated into gravitational lensing. This is a consequence of the transverse shift of a trajectory of light depending on its helicity that requires right-handed and left-handed components at the same observation point to be sourced from different points of the surface of last scattering. Whereas the resulting circular polarization is found far beyond the scope of current detection, our work establishes the optical Magnus effect on gravitational lensing as a new fundamental mechanism to produce circular polarization of CMB.

AI.tldr: 本文提出光学马格努斯效应在引力透镜中可产生CMB圆偏振，虽信号微弱难以探测，但建立了新的基础机制。
AI.motivation: 探索CMB圆偏振的新产生机制，特别是光学马格努斯效应在引力透镜中的作用。
AI.method: 将光学马格努斯效应（光线因螺旋性产生的横向位移）纳入引力透镜理论框架，推导CMB温度涨落如何诱导出圆偏振。
AI.result: 理论上圆偏振确实可由该机制产生，但信号强度远超当前探测能力范围。
AI.conclusion: 建立了光学马格努斯效应作为CMB圆偏振新基础机制的结论，尽管实际探测尚不可行。

title: Constraints on Self-Interacting Fuzzy Dark Matter from the Stellar Kinematics of the Dwarf Galaxy Leo II
summary: The one-parameter fuzzy dark matter (FDM) model has faced increasingly stringent constraints from both Lyman-$α$ forest observations and local measurements of dwarf galaxies. A natural extension to mitigate these limits is the inclusion of FDM self-interactions. In this study, we derive constraints in the two-dimensional parameter space $(m_a, f_a)$ using the dark matter density profile inferred from a Jeans analysis of the stellar kinematics in the dwarf galaxy Leo II, which has previously been employed to constrain non-interacting FDM. We find that, for a fixed particle mass $m_a$, attractive (repulsive) self-interaction leads to a more concentrated (more diffuse) FDM density profile relative to the non-interacting case, thereby improving (worsening) agreement with the Jeans analysis results. Our results indicate that, for either attractive or repulsive SI with strength $f_a^{-1}\lesssim 10^{-14}\,\mathrm{GeV}^{-1}$, the $95\%$ confidence-level lower limits on $m_a$ lies within the range $(1-10)\times10^{-22}\,\mathrm{eV}$, although the precise bounds depend to some extent on the statistical method employed. This analysis simultaneously constrains the two parameters $(m_a, f_a)$ without relying on assumptions about cosmological or galaxy evolution histories, and thus offers a complementary probe to existing constraints.

AI.tldr: 本文通过对矮星系Leo II的Jeans分析，在二维参数空间(m_a, f_a)中对具有自相互作用的模糊暗物质(FDM)模型进行了约束，发现吸引(排斥)自相互作用会改善(恶化)与观测的吻合度，并给出了95%置信水平下的下限约束。
AI.motivation: 单参数FDM模型面临来自Lyman-α森林和矮星系观测的日益严格约束，引入FDM自相互作用是缓解这些约束的自然扩展方案。
AI.method: 利用矮星系Leo II的恒星运动学Jeans分析所推断的暗物质密度轮廓，在二维参数空间(m_a, f_a)中对自相互作用FDM模型进行约束分析。
AI.result: 吸引(排斥)自相互作用使FDM密度轮廓更集中(弥散)，从而改善(恶化)与Jeans分析结果的吻合度；对于强度f_a^{-1}≲10^{-14}GeV^{-1}的自相互作用，m_a的95%置信水平下限在(1-10)×10^{-22}eV范围内。
AI.conclusion: 该分析同时约束了(m_a, f_a)两个参数，不依赖宇宙学或星系演化历史的假设，为现有约束提供了互补性探测手段。

title: Gravitational lensing time delay beyond the Shapiro/geometry split
summary: Time delays are a key observable in strong gravitational lensing systems. Their theoretical expression is usually written as a sum of a geometrical delay and a Shapiro delay, with cosmology entering through angular diameter distances and a redshift prefactor. In this work we derive this structure from the exact null geodesics of the Schwarzschild-de Sitter metric. The standard formula is recovered as the leading term in a small-angle expansion, and we identify the first correction to the usual geometrical-plus-Shapiro split. Such correction does not introduce any new cosmological dependence: it corresponds instead to a higher-order correction intrinsic to the Schwarzschild part of the metric. As a consequence, up to this order, the cosmological constant enters only through the unlensed angular diameter distances and the unlensed lens-redshift prefactor.

AI.tldr: 本文从Schwarzschild-de Sitter度规的精确零测地线出发，推导了强引力透镜时间延迟公式，恢复了标准公式作为小角度展开的首项，并识别了首个修正项——该修正不引入新的宇宙学依赖，仅来自Schwarzschild部分的高阶修正。
AI.motivation: 现有强引力透镜时间延迟公式通常被写为几何延迟与Shapiro延迟之和，宇宙学通过角直径距离和红移因子进入。作者希望通过从精确度规出发，严格推导该公式的结构，并检验是否存在高阶修正引入额外的宇宙学依赖。
AI.method: 从Schwarzschild-de Sitter度规的精确零测地线方程出发，对小角度展开，恢复标准公式作为首项，并识别出首个高阶修正项。
AI.result: 标准时间延迟公式是精确公式在小角度展开下的首项；首个修正项不引入新的宇宙学常数依赖，仅源于Schwarzschild部分的内禀高阶效应。
AI.conclusion: 宇宙学常数（暗能量）仅通过未受透镜影响的角直径距离和透镜红移因子进入时间延迟公式，高阶修正不改变这一基本结构。

title: The Rapid ASKAP Continuum Survey VII: Spectra and Polarisation In Cutouts of Extragalactic Sources (SPICE-RACS) Second Data Release -- Unveiling the Magnetised Sky
comment: Under review in PASA. 37 pages, 25 figures, 7 tables. Data are still under embargo, and will be released on paper acceptance
summary: We present the second data release (DR2) of Spectra and Polarisation in Cutouts of Extragalactic sources from RACS (SPICE-RACS). SPICE-RACS DR2 is derived from the third low-band epoch of the Rapid ASKAP Continuum Survey (RACS-low3) and covers the entire sky from the South celestial pole up to a declination of $+49^\circ$; approximately 87.5% of the celestial sphere. We produce 'cutout' spectral cubes in Stokes $I$, $Q$, $U$ around 4 million radio sources and extract spectra towards 5 million radio components. Across our observed band of 799.5--1087.5 MHz we find an $rms$ noise of $\sim200μ\mathrm{Jy/PSF}$, an angular resolution of $\sim15''$, and residual wide-field instrumental polarisation on the order of 0.1%. After de-duplication, our polarisation catalogue contains the detection of $2.5\times10^5$ ($3.4\times10^5$) Faraday rotation measures (RM) for components with a linearly polarised signal above $8σ$ ($6σ$). This places SPICE-RACS DR2 as the largest single RM catalogue ever produced by nearly an order of magnitude; the number of RMs in our catalogue alone is $\sim5$ times larger than every previous RM catalogue combined. Our resulting RM grid has an areal density of $6.7^{+1.8}_{-1.7}\mathrm{deg}^{-2}$, providing an effective 'resolution' of $\sim23'$, and reveals striking features across the sky. The broad-band RMs have a median uncertainty of $\sim2\ \mathrm{rad\ m}^{-2}$, and include complexity metrics and information from the time domain. The breadth and quality of the SPICE-RACS DR2 dataset will enable a new generation of RM science. Further, SPICE-RACS will provide an ideal reference for forthcoming deep polarisation surveys such as the ASKAP POSSUM survey. All of our data products are publicly available on the CSIRO Data Access Portal (DAP) and the CSIRO ASKAP Science Data Archive (CASDA).

AI.tldr: SPICE-RACS DR2发布了基于RACS-low3巡天的第二版数据，覆盖南天至赤纬+49°的87.5%天区，包含约400万个射电源的斯托克斯I、Q、U谱线立方体，以及迄今最大的法拉第旋转测量（RM）目录（约25万到34万个RM），其RM数量是此前所有RM目录总和的约5倍。
AI.motivation: 现有法拉第旋转测量（RM）目录的覆盖范围和数量有限，需要更大规模、更高密度的RM巡天数据来推进磁场科学和宇宙学研究。
AI.method: 利用RACS-low3（799.5–1087.5 MHz）数据，生成约400万射电源的斯托克斯I、Q、U谱线立方体，提取约500万射电成分的谱线，采用去重后以8σ和6σ信噪比阈值检测线性偏振信号，计算法拉第旋转量。
AI.result: 发布了包含约25万（8σ阈值）到34万（6σ阈值）个RM的目录，RM中位不确定度约2 rad/m²，角分辨率约15角秒，RMS噪声约200μJy/PSF，残余仪器偏振约0.1%，RM网格密度达6.7 deg⁻²，有效分辨率约23角分。
AI.conclusion: SPICE-RACS DR2是迄今最大的单一RM目录，其数据质量和覆盖范围将推动新一代RM科学研究，并为即将开展的深度偏振巡天（如ASKAP POSSUM）提供理想参考。所有数据已在CSIRO数据平台公开。

title: Faster CMB lensing with control variates
summary: We present a new method for fast computation of the realization-dependent bias, a major computational bottleneck in measurements of the cosmic microwave background (CMB) lensing power spectrum. The method accelerates the bias calculation by differencing two correlated estimates: one based on fully realistic masked simulations and the other on isotropic simulations, for which the bias is analytically tractable. We show that our algorithm reduces the total computational cost of a lensing power spectrum measurement by approximately a factor of five for Atacama Cosmology Telescope- or Simons Observatory-like noise levels, or by a factor of three if current anisotropic filtering methods are left unchanged. Owing to its simplicity, the method can be readily implemented in existing CMB lensing analysis pipelines.

AI.tldr: 提出一种快速计算CMB透镜功率谱中实现相关偏差的新方法，通过差分两个相关估计（真实掩模模拟与各向同性模拟）将计算成本降低3-5倍，且易于集成到现有分析管线中。
AI.motivation: CMB透镜功率谱测量中，实现相关偏差的计算是主要计算瓶颈，现有方法计算成本过高。
AI.method: 将基于真实掩模的全模拟估计与各向同性模拟的解析偏差估计进行差分，加速偏差计算。
AI.result: 对于ACT或Simons Observatory级别的噪声，总计算成本降低约5倍；若保持现有各向异性滤波方法不变，则降低约3倍。
AI.conclusion: 该方法简单有效，可轻松集成到现有CMB透镜分析管线中。

title: Magnetised CGM Gas at z~1 revealed by SPICE-RACS
comment: 9 pages, 13 figures, Accepted for publication in A&A Letters
summary: Magnetic fields are expected to permeate the circumgalactic medium (CGM) of galaxies, yet direct constraints at high redshift remain limited by the lack of high-quality Faraday rotation measure (RM) data. Using the RMs from SPICE-RACS DR2 combined with the DESI DR1 quasar catalogue, we compile the largest sample to date of 2483 quasar sightlines with associated RMs, including 612 with intervening Mg II absorbers tracing foreground galaxies and 1871 control sightlines without Mg II absorbers. After subtracting the Galactic RM contribution and restricting the analysis to sightlines with low Milky Way HI column density and H$α$ intensity, we obtain a foreground-cleaned sample of 757 quasars (191 Mg II / 566 control) spanning redshifts $0.13<z<3.45$. In this foreground-cleaned sample, Mg II sightlines exhibit a $4.5σ$ excess in the residual RM dispersion of $4.13 \pm 0.91~\mathrm{rad\,m^{-2}}$ relative to the control sample, at a median absorber redshift of $z\sim1.14$. This implies model-dependent CGM magnetic field strengths of $\sim0.4 - 0.8\, μ$G over projected radii of $20 - 150$ kpc. This indicates that substantial CGM magnetisation was already established by $z\sim1$, enabling new constraints on the growth and amplification of magnetic fields in galaxy halos over cosmic time.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用SPICE-RACS DR2和DESI DR1数据，构建了包含2483条类星体视线(其中612条含Mg II吸收体)的最大样本，通过扣除银河系贡献后，发现Mg II视线在残余RM色散上比对照样本高出4.13±0.91 rad/m²（4.5σ显著性），表明在红移~1.14处，星系周介质磁场强度已达约0.4-0.8 μG，证明宇宙在z~1时星系晕已建立了显著的磁化环境。
AI.motivation: 高红移星系周介质(CGM)的磁场直接观测证据极其有限，缺乏高质量法拉第旋转测量(RM)数据来约束CGM磁场特性及演化。
AI.method: 结合SPICE-RACS DR2的RM数据和DESI DR1类星体目录，构建最大样本；扣除银河系RM贡献，筛选低银河系HI柱密度和Hα强度的视线；比较含Mg II吸收体与对照样本的残余RM弥散差异。
AI.result: 在757个类星体的前景清洁样本中，Mg II视线比对照样本显示出4.13±0.91 rad/m²的残余RM色散超出（4.5σ显著性），对应CGM磁场强度约0.4-0.8 μG，投影半径20-150 kpc。
AI.conclusion: 宇宙在z~1时星系周介质已具备显著的磁化水平，为理解宇宙时间尺度上星系晕磁场的增长和放大提供了新约束。

title: Determination of the best dark matter profile for the Milky Way with Gaia DR3 using Bayesian Model Comparison
comment: 42 pages, 39 figures. Accepted for publication in Astrophysics and Space Science
summary: We carry out a Bayesian model comparison analysis to determine the dark matter model that best describes the Milky Way rotation curve, using four recent compilations of rotation-curve velocities with the Gaia data. We compare these data using three different baryonic models along with seven different dark matter models. Within the adopted modeling framework and Gaia-based rotation curve datasets, we find that the Einasto profile provides the preferred phenomenological fit compared to the NFW profile} across most combinations of datasets and baryonic models. We also find that the cored dark profiles are preferred over the (cuspy) NFW profile. We also test MOND using three different interpolating functions and find that, within the implementations considered, the models provide poorer fits than the preferred dark matter profiles. Finally, among the different baryonic models considered, none is decisively favored over the others.

AI.tldr: 基于Gaia数据，通过贝叶斯模型比较分析银河系旋转曲线，发现Einasto轮廓和核心暗物质模型优于NFW轮廓，而MOND拟合效果较差，不同重子模型之间无明显优劣。
AI.motivation: 利用最新的Gaia旋转曲线数据，通过贝叶斯模型比较，确定最能描述银河系旋转曲线的暗物质模型。
AI.method: 采用贝叶斯模型比较分析，使用四组Gaia旋转曲线速度数据，构建三种重子模型和七种暗物质模型（包括Einasto、NFW、核心暗物质模型等），并测试三种不同插值函数的MOND理论。
AI.result: Einasto轮廓优于NFW轮廓；核心暗物质模型优于尖点NFW模型；MOND拟合效果不如暗物质模型；不同重子模型之间无显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 在Gaia旋转曲线数据框架下，Einasto轮廓是最优的唯象暗物质模型，MOND的解释力不如暗物质模型。

title: The ${}^{13}\mathrm{CO}(2{-}1)/^{12}\mathrm{CO}(2{-}1)$ Line Ratio from 100 Molecular Clouds in the Large Magellanic Cloud
summary: We analyze the line ratio of the $^{13}$CO (2-1) to $^{12}$CO (2-1) rotational transitions observed from new ALMA observations of 100 Giant Molecular Clouds (GMCs) that span the Large Magellanic Cloud. We measure a median line ratio of $^{13}\mathrm{CO}(2{-}1)/^{12}\mathrm{CO}(2{-}1) = 0.078$ with $68\%$ of the sample falling between 0.058 and 0.107. A regression analysis confirms a nearly linear relationship across two orders of magnitude in line luminosity. Moreover, we find that the inclusion of $(L_{\text{FIR}})$ from Young Stellar Objects as a predictor variable of the line ratio significantly improves the quality of the fit, with clouds hosting IR-bright YSOs having relatively brighter $^{13}$CO emission. This analysis indicates that active star forming molecular clouds have different internal conditions than more quiescent clouds.

AI.tldr: 通过对大麦哲伦云中100个巨分子云的ALMA观测，测量了¹³CO(2-1)/¹²CO(2-1)线比中位数为0.078，发现线光度呈近线性关系，且活跃恒星形成分子云因内部条件不同而具有更亮的¹³CO发射。
AI.motivation: 探究分子云中¹³CO与¹²CO的线比特征及其与恒星形成活动的关系，以理解不同内部条件下分子云的性质差异。
AI.method: 利用ALMA对大麦哲伦云中100个巨分子云进行观测，测量¹³CO(2-1)/¹²CO(2-1)线比，进行回归分析并引入YSO的远红外光度作为预测变量。
AI.result: 线比中位数为0.078，68%样本落在0.058-0.107之间；线光度呈近线性关系；引入YSO远红外光度显著改善拟合质量，活跃星形成云具有更亮¹³CO发射。
AI.conclusion: 活跃恒星形成的分子云与静止分子云内部条件不同，¹³CO线比可作为区分指标。

title: PEARLS: JWST Counterparts of Micro-Jy Radio Sources in the NEP Time Domain Field. II. All Four Spokes
summary: JWST/NIRCam observations in the North Ecliptic Pole Time Domain Field (TDF) identify 4.4 micron counterparts for 206 of 211 radio sources with S(3 GHz) \gapprox 5 micro-Jy in a 65arcmin^2 field. One of the remaining radio sources is likely to be a radio lobe of a nearby Seyfert galaxy, and the four radio sources without counterparts could be spurious. All but five counterparts are brighter than magnitude 23.5 AB at 4.4 micron. A simple position match with radius 0.3 arcsec would have identified 198 of the counterparts but only in a 4.4 micron catalog created with aggressive deblending of multiple peaks within an object's brightness distribution into distinct catalog sources. The properties of the radio-host galaxies are mostly consistent with those found in Paper 1: the median redshift is 1.14, and the radio emission, calculated taking into account the non-linear dependence of radio luminosity on star-formation rate, is consistent with a star formation origin in ~79% of the sample. For the other ~21%, the radio flux could come from star formation hidden behind dust or from an active galactic nucleus. One difference from other studies of radio-source counterparts is that 66% of the radio hosts show at least one indication of an AGN's presence. The presence of AGN and of hidden star formation could be elucidated by monitoring for source variability, and the TDF is the field most suited to such observations.

AI.tldr: 利用JWST/NIRCam在北极黄道时域场中为206个射电源（S(3 GHz)≥5微央）识别出4.4微米对应体，其中约79%的射电发射源于恒星形成，约21%可能来自尘埃遮蔽的恒星形成或活动星系核。
AI.motivation: 为微焦量级射电源寻找可靠的红外对应体，并探究其射电辐射起源（恒星形成vs活动星系核）。
AI.method: 在65平方角分天区内，将JWST/NIRCam 4.4微米数据与3 GHz射电巡天进行位置交叉匹配（匹配半径0.3角秒），并采用激进解混算法处理多峰值天体。
AI.result: 成功匹配206/211个射电源，中值红移1.14，约79%的射电辐射与恒星形成一致，约21%可能来自尘埃遮蔽恒星形成或活动星系核，66%的射电宿主星系显示出活动星系核存在迹象。
AI.conclusion: JWST/NIRCam能有效识别微焦级射电源的对应体，但需激进解混算法；射电辐射起源需结合时域监测来区分活动星系核与尘埃遮蔽恒星形成的贡献。

title: From inter-filamentary gas to filaments and hubs: gas flows in the Mon R2 hub-filament system
comment: This paper was accepted for publication in ApJL on 16 May 2026
summary: Hub-filament systems (HFSs) play an important role in the formation of massive stars and star clusters. Although the velocity structures along dense filaments have been studied, the gas kinematics in the low density inter-filament regions has not been investigated. We use $^{13}$CO ($J$ = 1--0) and C$^{18}$O ($J$ = 1--0) observations obtained with the Nobeyama 45 m telescope to study the gas dynamics towards the Monoceros R2 (Mon R2) HFS. From the $^{13}$CO and C$^{18}$O data, tracing low- and high-density gas, respectively, we identify velocity coherent structures and divide them into filaments (Fs) and inter-filamentary regions (IFs). We estimate velocity gradients ($Δv$) and mass accretion rates ($\dot{M}$) along ($\parallel$) and across ($\perp$) the Fs and IFs. The mean ratio of $\dot{M}_\parallel$ to $\dot{M}_\perp$ in Fs is 6.8, while that in IFs is 1.5. These results show that the overall gas within both Fs and IFs flows directly into the hub and the gas flows faster along the Fs than the IFs. In addition, we found that at least 30\% of the gas mass in the IFs may flow towards the Fs replenishing the latter with new matter. Our study reveals the importance of considering the total gas mass reservoir, both low- and high-density, infalling into the hub and promoting the formation of massive stars, which are preferentially located in the hub of Mon R2.

AI.tldr: 该研究利用Nobeyama 45米望远镜的$^{13}$CO和C$^{18}$O观测数据，分析了Monoceros R2 Hub-纤维系统(HFS)中低密度和高密度气体的运动学。发现纤维(Fs)中的气体沿纤维方向流向中心的速度远快于纤维间区域(IFs)；同时，至少30%的IFs气体会流向Fs进行物质补充。这表明需同时考虑高低密度气体对中心大质量恒星形成的物质供应。
AI.motivation: 以往研究关注了致密纤维中的速度结构，但尚未对低密度纤维间区域的气体运动学进行探究。
AI.method: 使用Nobeyama 45米望远镜的$^{13}$CO(1-0)和C$^{18}$O(1-0)观测数据，分别追踪低密度和高密度气体；识别速度相干结构并将其分为纤维(Fs)和纤维间区域(IFs)；估算沿纤维方向和平行方向的速率梯度及质量吸积率。
AI.result: Fs中平行/垂直方向质量吸积率比值为6.8，IFs中为1.5；至少30%的IFs气体质量可能流向Fs。
AI.conclusion: Fs和IFs中的气体整体上直接流向中心Hub；气体沿纤维方向流动比纤维间更快；IFs气体可补充Fs物质；考虑总气体质量库（包括低密度和高密度）对理解大质量恒星形成至关重要。

title: Polarization Observations of a Sample of 6.7 GHz Methanol Masers
summary: Spectra of 6.7 GHz methanol masers from 21 pointings of known star-forming regions are reported. The C-band observations, using the Green Bank Telescope in full Stokes mode, have measured how polarization properties vary across the maser profiles in each spectrum and vary between different epochs of observation. Two-thirds of the sources are observed to have 6.7 GHz methanol masers, including one new detection (G240.316+0.071). Linear polarization is in the range 0 to 15% and circular polarization 0 to $\pm$9%, in line with previously reported values. The only instances where polarization is not observed is when these polarization ranges are below 3$σ$ detection limits. Zeeman splitting is observed in several sources, with splitting values derived from velocity separation between RCP and LCP components via Gaussian fitting. These values are seen to change with time and appear to correspond to changes in the linear and circular polarization. The polarization properties varying across the spectra and changing with time are most likely due to variations in the magnetic fields.

AI.tldr: 本文报告了21个已知恒星形成区域的6.7 GHz甲醇脉泽谱线观测，分析了其偏振特性随时间和谱线的变化，并探测到新源G240.316+0.071，发现偏振变化主要由磁场变化引起。
AI.motivation: 研究6.7 GHz甲醇脉泽的偏振特性，探测其随时间的变化规律，以揭示磁场在恒星形成过程中的作用。
AI.method: 使用Green Bank Telescope在C波段进行全斯托克斯模式观测，通过高斯拟合分析RCP和LCP分量的速度分离来推导塞曼分裂值。
AI.result: 三分之二的源检测到6.7 GHz甲醇脉泽，含一个新源；线偏振范围为0-15%，圆偏振为0-±9%；多个源观测到塞曼分裂，分裂值随时间变化且与线/圆偏振变化相关。
AI.conclusion: 偏振特性随谱线和时间的变化很可能由磁场变化引起。

title: Feedback driven interactions between dark and luminous matter to explain tight galaxy scaling relations
summary: The tight empirical correlation linking the stellar disk scale length $R_d$ to the dark matter scale radius $r_0$ has been proposed as possible evidence for a fundamental coupling between baryons and dark matter beyond gravity. We re-examine the physical origin of this relation using a sample of 31 galaxies from the NIHAO cosmological hydrodynamical simulations, which include no dark matter-baryon interactions beyond gravity and baryonic feedback processes. NIHAO naturally reproduces both the normalization and the small scatter of the observed $R_d-r_0$ relation at $z=0$, while yielding a slightly shallower slope. By tracking galaxies from $z=2$ to $z=0$, we identify three distinct evolutionary classes: systems undergoing disk expansion, contraction, and quasi-static evolution. Using a Bayesian hierarchical framework, we provide the first characterization of the cosmic evolution of the $R_d-r_0$ relation, tracing the evolution of its normalization, slope, and intrinsic scatter from $z=2$ to the present day. We find a mild decrease in normalization ($\sim0.07$ dex), a flattening of the slope from $α\simeq 1.05$ to $α\simeq 0.95$, and a weak decline in the intrinsic scatter toward lower redshift, suggesting that galaxies evolve preferentially along the relation while jointly re-balancing their stellar and dark matter scales. By comparing hydrodynamical simulations with their dark-matter-only counterparts, we isolate the impact of baryons and baryonic feedback on halo structure. Our results show that stellar feedback alone can reshape the central potential and naturally establish the observed coupling between luminous and dark matter, without requiring modifications to the dark sector.

AI.tldr: 通过NIHAO宇宙学流体模拟，本文发现星系盘标长与暗物质标度半径之间的紧密相关性可由重子反馈自然产生，无需引入暗物质与重子之间的非引力相互作用。
AI.motivation: 检验星系盘标长$R_d$与暗物质标度半径$r_0$之间的经验相关性是否源于重子与暗物质之间的非引力耦合，并探究其物理起源。
AI.method: 利用31个来自NIHAO宇宙学流体模拟的星系样本（仅包含重力和重子反馈），追踪z=2到z=0的演化，使用贝叶斯层次框架刻画$R_d-r_0$关系的宇宙学演化，并与纯暗物质模拟对比。
AI.result: NIHAO模拟自然复现了观测到的$R_d-r_0$关系的归一化和小弥散度，但斜率略浅；识别出盘膨胀、收缩和准静态演化三类星系；关系归一化随红移轻微下降（~0.07 dex），斜率从$\alpha\simeq1.05$变平至$\alpha\simeq0.95$，固有弥散度向低红移减弱。
AI.conclusion: 重子反馈本身即可重塑中心势场，自然建立起发光物质与暗物质之间的观测耦合，无需引入超出引力的暗物质-重子相互作用或修改暗物质模型。

title: Coupled quintessence with a potential from supergravity exhibits sign-changing interaction
summary: Quintessence with a potential motivated by supergravity (SUGRA) exhibits several intriguing features. Depending on its initial conditions, it can behave either as dynamical dark energy or effectively as a cosmological constant. Moreover, when quintessence is coupled to dark matter, the effective dark-energy equation of state can cross the phantom divide. In this paper, we test both coupled and uncoupled SUGRA quintessence models using DESI BAO, DES-Dovekie SNIa, and Planck CMB data. We find that current observations strongly favor a coupling between dark energy and dark matter, with the coupling parameter deviating from zero at more than $4σ$. The data also favor the branch of coupled SUGRA quintessence in which the energy transfer between the two dark sectors changes sign, leading to a crossing of the phantom divide by the effective dark-energy equation of state. Interestingly, this coupled SUGRA branch is statistically indistinguishable from dark energy described by the CPL parametrization, with only a very small difference in $χ^2_\mathrm{min}$. Our results suggest that coupled quintessence with a SUGRA potential provides a field-theoretic realization of the evolving dark energy behavior favored by the latest observations.

AI.tldr: 本文测试了超引力（SUGRA）精质场暗能量模型，发现观测数据强烈支持暗能量与暗物质之间存在耦合（>4σ显著性），且能量传递会改变符号导致有效状态方程穿越幻象分割线，该模型在统计上与CPL参数化难以区分。
AI.motivation: 探索超引力启发的精质场势能模型在耦合与非耦合情况下的表现，检验其能否解释当前宇宙学观测所暗示的演化暗能量行为。
AI.method: 使用DESI BAO、DES-Dovekie SNIa和Planck CMB数据，对耦合与非耦合的SUGRA精质场模型进行统计检验和参数约束。
AI.result: 耦合参数在超过4σ置信水平上偏离零；数据偏好能量传递符号改变的分支；该分支与CPL参数化在统计学上几乎不可区分。
AI.conclusion: 耦合SUGRA精质场为观测所偏好的演化暗能量提供了一个场论实现基础。

title: The limits of feedback from active galactic nuclei
comment: 17 pages, 8 figures. Companion letter (Peiris et al.) in this listing
summary: We use FLAMINGO to investigate why feedback from active galactic nuclei (AGN) significantly depletes gas in galaxy groups but is ineffective in clusters. We delineate three radial zones: an inner zone where AGN feedback heats halo gas via shocks; an intermediate buoyancy zone where the heated halo gas rises; and an outer zone where the outflow may stall in a termination shock. Heating in the inner zone self-limits because, once the gas is sufficiently hot, shocks become too weak to deposit further entropy. Consequently, outflows have a ceiling entropy value ($360\, {\rm keV\, cm^2}$) that is nearly independent of halo mass. These values (and trends with redshift and feedback variants) are explained using an argument based on the Rankine-Hugoniot relations. Outflows rise at fixed entropy through the buoyancy zone, escaping the halo if the ceiling value is sufficiently elevated over that of the inflowing gas. This condition is satisfied only for halo masses $M_{\rm 200m}<10^{13.7}\,{\rm M_\odot}$, because inflow entropy tracks the virial relation. Variants with stronger (or weaker) feedback have a higher (or lower) entropy ceiling and a correspondingly modified critical mass of $M_{\rm 200m}=10^{14.0}\,{\rm M_\odot}$ (or $10^{13.5}\,{\rm M_\odot}$). In clusters above the critical mass, the increased inflow entropy causes the outflow to stall and potentially shock at the 'splashback' radius. We derive an expression for the time evolution of the virial gas fraction, which shows how lingering gas is reincorporated as the halo virial radius expands. This effect dominates over outflows unless they rejoin the Hubble flow; as a result, virial gas fractions rise as a function of mass starting at $M_{\rm 200m} = 10^{13.0}\,{\rm M_\odot}$. These effects explain why groups have depleted gas, while clusters have close to the cosmic baryon fraction.

AI.tldr: 本文利用FLAMINGO模拟研究AGN反馈为何在星系群中显著耗散气体，而在星系团中效果不佳。通过划分三个径向区域（内激波加热区、中间浮力区、外终止激波区），发现加热自限性导致外流具有几乎与晕质量无关的上限熵值（约360 keV cm²），只有当该值高于入流熵时气体才能逃逸，这一条件仅在晕质量小于10^13.7 M⊙时满足，从而解释了群与团的气体含量差异。
AI.motivation: 探究AGN反馈在不同质量晕（星系群vs星系团）中产生不同气体耗散效果的根本物理机制，解释为何星系群气体被大量耗尽而星系团仍保有接近宇宙重子份额的气体。
AI.method: 使用FLAMINGO模拟，划分三个径向区域（内区激波加热、中间区浮力上升、外区终止激波），基于Rankine-Hugoniot关系分析熵上限，并推导维里气体分数的时间演化表达式。
AI.result: 发现AGN外流具有与晕质量无关的熵上限（~360 keV cm²），反馈强度变化会改变该值（~10^14.0或10^13.5 M⊙对应临界质量）。仅当晕质量M_200m < 10^13.7 M⊙时，外流才能逃逸；更大质量晕中气体被重新吸积，维里气体分数随质量从10^13.0 M⊙开始上升。
AI.conclusion: 星系群气体被耗散而星系团气体接近宇宙重子分数的现象，根源在于入流熵随晕质量增长的维里关系决定了外流能否逃逸；临界质量以上的晕中，气体再吸积效应主导，使得维里气体分数随质量增加而恢复。

title: Co-evolution of Supermassive Black Holes and their Host L* galaxies: implications for Milky Way and M31
summary: We investigate the origin of the scatter in the supermassive black hole (BH) masses for galaxies in the L* regime, using the ARTEMIS and EAGLE simulations. By classifying galaxies based on their central BH / galaxy stellar masses ratios, we follow the evolution of galaxies with the lowest and highest such ratios (denoted LBH and HBH, respectively). We find that the properties of these two galaxy samples are comparable at z ~ 2 but diverge significantly towards lower redshifts. Galaxies with less massive BHs were able to maintain higher gas fractions and sustained star formation during their evolution, whereas those with more massive BHs formed stars earlier, grew BHs faster and experienced more efficient feedback and subsequent quenching. The simulations broadly match the observed scatter in the BH masses and galaxy morphologies in the L* regime and explain the origin of this scatter in terms of differences between merger histories. Galaxies with more active merger histories contain more massive BHs at present time and tend to be elliptical, while galaxies with more quiescent histories have less massive BHs and tend to be disc-like. Mergers enhance BH growth through higher gas accretion rates onto central regions and direct BH-BH mergers. However, these channels operate differently: in HBH galaxies, BHs grow primarily (~ 90%) by gas accretion, whereas in LBH they grow both through gas accretion (~ 60%) and BH-BH mergers (~40%). Our results suggest that the different BH masses in MW and M31 could be explained by differences in merger histories.

AI.tldr: 基于ARTEMIS和EAGLE模拟，研究了L*星系中超大质量黑洞质量离散的起源，发现不同的并合历史导致黑洞质量差异：活跃并合历史产生更大质量黑洞和椭圆星系，宁静历史产生较小黑洞和盘状星系。
AI.motivation: 探究L*星系中黑洞质量离散的物理起源，理解不同黑洞质量的星系在演化路径上的差异。
AI.method: 利用ARTEMIS和EAGLE模拟，按中心黑洞与星系恒星质量比分类为LBH（低比值）和HBH（高比值），追踪两类星系从z~2到低红移的演化。
AI.result: 在z~2时两类星系性质相似，随后出现分化；LBH星系维持高气体分数和持续恒星形成，HBH星系早期形成恒星、黑洞增长更快并经历反馈淬灭；HBH中黑洞主要通过气体吸积（~90%）增长，LBH中气体吸积（~60%）和黑洞并合（~40%）共同作用。
AI.conclusion: 并合历史的差异是L*星系黑洞质量离散的主要原因，这可以解释银河系和M31黑洞质量的差异。

title: BISTRO Survey: Gravity-Dominated and Magnetically Regulated Star Formation in M17 SW
summary: We present high-resolution magnetic field maps of the M17 SW molecular cloud using JCMT 850 $μ$m dust polarization at a scale of 14$''$. The magnetic field exhibits a distinct arc-like structure that encircles three dense clumps (C1, C2, and C3). By combining polarization data with ammonia line observations, the plane-of-sky magnetic field strength, measured using the Skalidis-Tassis method to minimize angle dispersion errors, ranges from 0.1 to 2.4 mG (mean: 0.54 mG). Energy budget analysis reveals a hierarchy dominated by gravity ($e_G \approx 10^{-7.8}$ erg cm$^{-3}$), which exceeds both magnetic ($e_B \approx 10^{-8.3}$ erg cm$^{-3}$) and turbulent ($e_k \approx 10^{-8.7}$ erg cm$^{-3}$) energies. Since all three energy densities lie within one order of magnitude, gravitational dominance acts primarily as the global driver, while the system remains in a state of near-equipartition. Structurally, the northeastern boundary shows magnetic field lines perpendicular to the shock front, consistent with compression from the adjacent HII region. Within the cloud, magnetic field lines generally align with gravity to assist collapse, but turn perpendicular to gravity within curved accretion bridges. This configuration provides support against radial collapse while guiding gas flow. Kinematic evidence suggests that these channels transport material from Clump C3 onto the massive Clump C2. Star formation in M17 SW is globally driven by gravity but locally regulated by the magnetic field structure.

AI.tldr: 利用JCMT 850 μm尘埃偏振观测，绘制了M17 SW分子云的高分辨率磁场图。磁场呈弧形结构环绕三个稠密团块。通过Skalidis-Tassis方法测量磁场强度为0.1-2.4 mG（均值0.54 mG）。能量分析显示引力主导（e_G≈10⁻⁷.8 erg cm⁻³），超过磁场（e_B≈10⁻⁸.3）和湍流（e_K≈10⁻⁸.7），但三者量级相近，系统处于近均衡态。磁场上游垂直激波面，内部引力与磁场协同坍缩，但在吸积桥中磁场垂直引力，支撑径向坍缩并引导气流。运动学证据表明物质从C3流向C2。该区域恒星形成受引力全局驱动，但受磁场结构局部调控。
AI.motivation: M17 SW是活跃的大质量恒星形成区，但其磁场结构、能量分布及对恒星形成过程的影响尚不清楚。本文旨在通过高分辨率极化观测揭示磁场几何构型与引力、湍流的相互作用机制。
AI.method: 使用JCMT 850 μm尘埃偏振观测获取14角秒分辨率磁场图；结合氨分子谱线数据；采用Skalidis-Tassis方法计算平面磁场强度以减小角度弥散误差；进行能量密度分析（引力、磁场、湍流）；分析磁场与激波面、引力方向及吸积结构的几何关系。
AI.result: 磁场呈现弧状结构环绕三个稠密团块（C1/C2/C3）；磁场强度0.1-2.4 mG（均值0.54 mG）；能量密度引力＞磁场＞湍流（量级跨度＜1 dex）；东北边界磁场垂直激波面；云核内部磁场平行引力，吸积桥中磁场垂直引力；运动学证据支持C3→C2的物质输运。
AI.conclusion: M17 SW的恒星形成由引力全局驱动，但磁场在局部发挥调控作用：在吸积桥中提供径向支撑并引导气流，从而影响大质量团块的形成与物质输运效率。

title: SDSS-V: Revealing a weak accretion state in X-ray selected red quasars
summary: Red quasars (rQSOs) have been recognized as a short-lived, early stage in the evolutionary cycle of Active Galactic Nuclei (AGN), with fundamental differences in their intrinsic properties compared to blue quasars (bQSOs). In this work, we present the first large X-ray sample of 380 rQSOs, selected from the eROSITA/SDSS-V collaboration, providing uniform X-ray detection with optical spectroscopy accros half the sky, in the German hemisphere of eROSITA. We combine X-ray imaging, optical spectroscopy, and multi-wavelength photometry to fully probe the accretion, absorption and host properties of rQSOs. Independent Component Analysis is used to reconstruct optical spectra in a data-driven and non-parametric approach, while accounting for dust reddening and host contamination. rQSOs are intrinsically X-ray weak compared to bQSOs, with a higher fraction found at low X-ray luminosities (over 50$\%$ of the rQSO sample have $L_X < 10^{43.5} \, \rm erg \, s^{-1}$). We investigate the relative X-ray strength of rQSOs by measuring the spectral slope indicator $α_{OX}$. Despite their suppressed X-ray emission, rQSOs are not optically faint, but show low $α_{OX}$ values, indicating weak X-ray emission relative to their bright optical continua. X-ray spectral measurements reveal large gas column densities relative to optical reddening due to dust, implying that X-ray absorption could arise from dust-free gas close to the supermassive Black Hole (BH) rather than a classical dusty torus, while the dust responsible for optical reddening likely resides on larger host-galaxy scales or is associated with dusty gas carried in disc winds. rQSOs trace a phase of suppressed BH assembly relative to stellar mass growth, suggesting that they represent a distinct evolutionary stage where BH accretion is suppressed while the host galaxy continues to grow.

AI.tldr: 本文基于eROSITA/SDSS-V合作数据，构建了首个包含380个红类星体（rQSOs）的大样本X射线目录，发现rQSOs相比蓝类星体（bQSOs） intrinsically X射线更弱，其X射线吸收源于黑洞附近的无尘气体而非经典尘埃环，光学红化则来自更大尺度的宿主星系或盘风中的尘埃气体，表明rQSOs代表一种黑洞吸积受抑制而宿主星系持续增长的独特演化阶段。
AI.motivation: 红类星体被认为是活动星系核（AGN）演化早期阶段的短暂阶段，但其内在性质与蓝类星体存在根本差异，此前缺乏大样本、均匀的X射线观测来系统研究其X射线特性。
AI.method: 从eROSITA/SDSS-V合作中选取380个红类星体，结合X射线成像、光学光谱和多波段测光数据，采用独立成分分析（ICA）以数据驱动、非参数方式重建光学光谱，同时考虑尘埃红化和宿主星系污染。
AI.result: rQSOs在X射线波段本质较弱，超过50%样本的X射线光度低于10^43.5 erg/s；其α_OX值较低，表明相对于明亮光学连续谱，X射线辐射较弱；X射线光谱测量显示相较于光学红化，气体柱密度较大，暗示X射线吸收来自黑洞附近的无尘气体。
AI.conclusion: 红类星体代表一个独特的演化阶段，其中黑洞吸积受抑制，而宿主星系继续增长，其X射线弱化和吸收特性源于不同于经典尘埃环的物理机制。

title: Velocity-resolved [O I] 63,145 um, [C II] 158 um, and OH line mapping along the Orion BN/KL explosive outflow and irradiated shocks
comment: Accepted for publication in A&A. Abstract abridged. English not edited
summary: Stellar mergers produce explosive outflows that serve as transient sources of IR line luminosity and inject mechanical energy early into the natal molecular cloud. We present the first velocity-resolved maps of the [O I] 63 and 145 um fine-structure line emission from the wide-angle outflow in Orion BN/KL, the nearest explosive outflow. The data were obtained with SOFIA and include sensitive [C II] 158 um and OH maps. They allowed us to disentangle the quiescent cloud gas from the outflow, traced by a broader [O I] component with a line FWHM of about 20-30 km/s and exhibiting a spatial distribution similar to that of the shock-excited H2 emission seen with JWST. The OH 119 um line shows a prominent P-Cygni profile covering 160 km/s, similar to the very broad CO lines. The total [O I] 63 and 145 line luminosity is remarkably high, 86.5 L_sun, comparable to the H2 and CO line luminosities, implying an outflow mass-loss rate of (9.1+/-2.6)x10^-3 M_sun/yr and a mass of 3.3-5.9 M_sun. The [O I] 63 / 145 and [O I] 63 / [C II] 158 intensity ratios reach very high values in the line wings (20-30 and 40-60, respectively), exceeding those found in PDRs. These ratios are consistent with the presence of dense (10^5 to 10^6 cm^-3 ) and warm (~500 K) postshock gas. We analyzed the fine-structure line-wing intensities using magnetized shock models that include UV irradiation, to which the [C II] 158 line intensity is particularly sensitive. We find that the [O I] and [C II] intensities are consistent with emission from dissociative J-type shocks with velocities of 30-40 km/s and preshock gas densities of a few 10^4 cm^-3, illuminated by external UV radiation generated by surrounding fast shocks and possibly by massive (proto)stars in the region. We also report a broad [O I] emission feature around the BN star, which we attribute to an unresolved outflow or wind bow shock.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用SOFIA望远镜对Orion BN/KL区域中[O I] 63和145微米精细结构谱线进行首次速度分辨成像，揭示了爆炸性外流中激波激发气体的性质，发现其具有高光度、高质量损失率，并利用磁化激波模型结合紫外辐射解释了观测到的线强比率，支持了J型激波（30-40 km/s）的存在。
AI.motivation: 恒星并合产生的爆炸性外流是红外谱线瞬变源，并向早期分子云注入机械能。Orion BN/KL是最邻近的爆炸性外流，但此前缺乏对其速度分辨的[O I]精细结构线观测，限制了对外流物理性质的理解。
AI.method: 使用SOFIA望远镜获取[O I] 63、145微米以及[C II] 158微米和OH 119微米谱线的高灵敏度速度分辨图；通过线宽和空间分布区分背景云气和外流成分；利用[O I] 63/145和[O I] 63/[C II] 158线强比率诊断气体密度和温度；结合包含紫外辐照的磁化激波模型（J型激波）拟合观测数据。
AI.result: [O I]外流成分线宽约20-30 km/s，空间分布与JWST观测的H2激波发射一致；OH 119微米线呈现覆盖160 km/s的P-Cygni轮廓；总[O I]线光度高达86.5 L_sun，与H2和CO线光度相当；外流质量损失率为(9.1±2.6)×10^-3 M_sun/yr，质量为3.3-5.9 M_sun；线强比率在谱线翼部极高，与密度10^5-10^6 cm^-3、温度~500 K的激波后气体一致；激波模型支持速度30-40 km/s的J型激波，预激波密度约10^4 cm^-3，并受周围快激波和大质量（原）恒星产生的紫外辐射照射。
AI.conclusion: [O I]精细结构线是探测爆炸性外流中激波气体的有效探针，结合[C II]和OH线可以全面刻画外流的动力学和物理条件。研究结果支持Orion BN/KL外流由高速J型激波驱动，并受到紫外辐射场的显著影响。

title: Constraining the magnetic field strength of a flaring radio core in the compact steep spectrum source 3C 138
comment: 10 pages, 7 figures. Accepted for publication in Astronomy & Astrophysics (A&A)
summary: Compact steep spectrum (CSS) sources generally show weak Doppler boosting, yet some exceptions show multi-year-scale radio flux variability and high-energy activity. Since 2022, the CSS quasar 3C 138 has been in a radio high state accompanied by multiple gamma-ray outbursts, offering unique opportunities to study changes in jet physical conditions. We estimated the synchrotron self-absorption (SSA) magnetic field ($B_{\rm SSA}$) in the SSA core of 3C 138 during its high state and compared it with the equipartition magnetic field ($B_{\rm eq}$) to assess the core field environment. Using extended Korean Very long-baseline interferometry Network (KVN) data at 22, 43, 86, and 129 GHz (2024-2025), we calibrated the visibilities and modeled resolved components with circular Gaussians. A single-zone SSA model fitted to the core spectrum provided the turnover frequency and peak flux density, from which we estimated the $B_{\rm SSA}$ and $B_{\rm eq}$. We used Very Large Array and Atacama Large Millimeter/submillimeter Array data to constrain the broadband spectra with the same model. The KVN SSA core shows a turnover at about 33 GHz and a peak flux of about 1.45 Jy. The inferred $B_{\rm SSA}$ is far below equipartition, with $B_{\rm SSA}/B_{\rm eq}\approx0.05$. The flux variability of 3C 138 is driven by a compact, particle-dominated core. Shock-driven particle injection in the inner jet could account for the core brightening and the production of X-ray/gamma-ray emissions through an inverse-Compton process without requiring extreme relativistic beaming effects.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了CSS类星体3C 138在2022年后进入射电高态并伴随伽马射线爆发的现象。利用韩国KVN等望远镜的多频数据，通过同步自吸收模型估算其核心磁感应强度，发现该源核心处于粒子主导状态且远低于等分磁场，表明激波驱动的粒子注入而非极端相对论性束效应是观测到的多波段活动的关键机制。
AI.motivation: 尽管CSS源通常表现出弱的多普勒增亮，但3C 138自2022年起进入射电高态并伴有多次伽马射线爆发，为研究喷流物理条件的变化提供了独特机会。
AI.method: 利用韩国KVN在22/43/86/129 GHz的甚长基线干涉数据（2024-2025年），校准可见度并用圆形高斯模型解析成分；通过单区SSA模型拟合核心谱以获得转折频率和峰值流量密度，进而估算SSA磁场和等分磁场；并用VLA和ALMA数据约束宽带谱。
AI.result: KVN SSA核心的转折频率约33 GHz，峰值流量约1.45 Jy；BSA/B_eq比值约0.05，SSA磁场远低于等分磁场。
AI.conclusion: 3C 138的流量变化由紧凑的粒子主导核心驱动；内喷流中激波驱动的粒子注入可解释核心增亮及通过逆康普顿过程产生X射线/伽马射线辐射，无需极端相对论性束效应。
